_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: User-centred content design involves focusing on user needs through an evidence-based and iterative design process, to ensure content is easy to use and understand.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, instructional design methods, knowledge retention research, and blended learning delivery models.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-S-006 (AB, cosine: 0.344), AB-T-006 (AB, cosine: 0.337).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.335). Shared vocabulary: [design]. DDaT-only terms [based, centred, content, easy, ensure, evidence] vs WIDAI-only terms [adult, blended, delivery, instructional, knowledge, learning] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.862 (P=0.856, R=0.868). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DDaT element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.6%). "User-centred content design involves focusing on user needs through an evidence-" and "Knowledge of adult learning design principles, including learning objectives, in" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.429 > STS 0.335 (gap +0.094). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [design] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.7%. Shared tokens: [design]. DDaT-only: [based, centred, content, easy, ensure, evidence]. WIDAI-only: [adult, blended, delivery, instructional, knowledge, learning].
